calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Petitioner Nam Van Nguyen present in pro per for self and as guardain ad litem for and with Calvin Duy Nguyen a minor. Co-petitioner Thanh Thi Nguyen (mother) also present.
Petitioners were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name an Adult to Nam Van Pham and change of a Minor name to Calvin Duy Pham.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
